name: Dennilwen
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) female wearing lower-class clothing. Armed with a bow and often carries arrows of qualms.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: sharpshooter, thief, hostile, criminal, aggressive
Role: Dennilwen is a sharpshooter and thief hiding out with her criminal companions in Hrota Cave, located just north of Anvil.
Home Location Information: Hrota Cave, north of Anvil. She remains in one of the first chambers of the cave.
Daily Routine: Dennilwen stays in her chamber of the cave at all times, never sleeping or eating. She remains vigilant and ready for combat.
Personality - The Cave Archer: Dennilwen is hostile and aggressive toward intruders. She attacks on sight without warning or explanation and will not accept any attempt at surrender or negotiation.
author: Bethesda
